title: Public Health Agency of Canada evaluation reports - Canada.ca
content:
## Public Health Agency of Canada evaluation reports
The Office of Audit and Evaluation conducts evaluations that provide credible, timely, and neutral evidence to support government accountability and decision-making on policy, expenditure management, and program improvements within the Public Health Agency of Canada and Health Canada.
Publication of these evaluation reports is consistent with the Government of Canada Policy on Results which requires government organizations to make reports and Management Response and Action Plans (MRAPs) accessible to the public.
- At a glance: Departmental Evaluation Plan for the Public Health Agency of Canada 2025-2026 to 2029-2030
- At a glance: Departmental Evaluation Plan for the Public Health Agency of Canada, 2024-25 to 2028-29
- At a glance: Departmental Evaluation Plan for the Public Health Agency of Canada, 2023-24 to 2027-28

- At a Glance - Departmental Evaluation Plan for the Public Health Agency of Canada and Health Canada, 2019-20 to 2023-24
